consumerTone: plain English; educational musculoskeletal DNA context only; no diagnosis, treatment, injury-risk, pain-cause, arthritis, EDS, osteoporosis, imaging, lab, or exercise-clearance claims

genomeEvidence.observedValue: calibrated musculoskeletal DNA score, diagnostic evidence, treatment evidence, injury-risk model, pain model, arthritis model, EDS model, osteoporosis model, bone-density evidence, imaging evidence, lab evidence, exercise-clearance context, and ancestry applicability metadata unavailable in this fixture; public Gene-In-Form sample PDF muscle-fiber, tendon/ACL injury, and osteoarthritis rows observed separately as sibling output-structure evidence

inputManifest.source: synthetic derived fitness-trait evidence for musculoskeletal-dna-report validation

missingInputPolicy: Report unavailable Musculoskeletal DNA Report calibrated models explicitly; use sibling Gene-In-Form sample rows only as observed output-format examples and do not diagnose musculoskeletal disease, estimate injury risk, explain pain, infer arthritis, EDS, osteoporosis, bone density, imaging findings, lab findings, treatment need, exercise prescription, exercise clearance, or actionability from genotype alone or sample-only rows.
